section_name: Removing or Covering Signs in Construction or Maintenance Work Zone
text:
(a) In this section, “construction or maintenance work zone” has the meaning assigned by Section 472.022 (Obeying Warning Signs and Barricades) .

(b) The department shall remove or cover or require the removal or covering of a sign that restricts the speed limit in a construction or maintenance work zone during any period when no hazard exists that dictates the need for a restricted speed limit.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 201. Gen. Provisions & Admin.
##### § 201.908 — Removing or Covering Signs in Construction or Maintenance Work Zone

(a) In this section, “construction or maintenance work zone” has the meaning assigned by Section 472.022 (Obeying Warning Signs and Barricades) .

(b) The department shall remove or cover or require the removal or covering of a sign that restricts the speed limit in a construction or maintenance work zone during any period when no hazard exists that dictates the need for a restricted speed limit.

*Renumbered from Transportation Code, Section201.907 (Contract for Enforcement)by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 87 (S.B.1969), Sec. 27.001(91), eff. September 1, 2009.*
